summary: Completed testing of 4 new features for iteration 13: (1) Calculator checkbox multi-select in OPCJE DODATKOWE - WORKING, (2) Admin installment logo upload for saunas/bathtubs - WORKING, (3) Admin special offer cards with photo upload - WORKING, (4) Calculator no discount + CTA text + installment info in model cards - ALL WORKING. All 12 backend API tests passed. Frontend verification confirmed all features.
passed_tests: API: GET /api/settings/installment returns {id, sauna_logo_url, balia_logo_url}
API: PUT /api/admin/settings/installment saves and persists logo URLs
API: PUT /api/admin/settings/installment requires authentication (401 without auth)
API: GET /api/settings/special-offer returns {id, cards:[]}
API: PUT /api/admin/settings/special-offer saves cards with title, subtitle, value, desc, icon, image
API: PUT /api/admin/settings/special-offer requires authentication
API: GET /api/sauna/prices returns models and categories
API: POST /api/admin/upload works with authentication
API: Health endpoint returns healthy status
API: Admin login works with correct credentials
FRONTEND: Calculator section loads with data-testid='calculator-section'
FRONTEND: Calculator total price displays correctly (data-testid='calculator-total-price')
FRONTEND: Calculator CTA text 'Zbierz zamowienie teraz i zafixuj swoja indywidualna znizke!' visible (data-testid='calculator-discount-cta')
FRONTEND: Calculator installment info block shows 'Raty od 500 zl/mc' (data-testid='calculator-installment-info')
FRONTEND: Calculator has NO 'Rabat' (discount) line in price breakdown
FRONTEND: Calculator checkbox multi-select WORKING in OPCJE DODATKOWE - both options remain selected
FRONTEND: Calculator shows '2 wyb.' badge when 2 options selected in checkbox category
FRONTEND: Calculator price correctly sums base + options (11,000 + 500 + 550 = 12,050 PLN)
FRONTEND: Model cards (13 found) all have installment blocks (data-testid='model-installment-{id}')
FRONTEND: Model installment blocks show 'Raty od 500 zl/mc' and 'Od 4 do 20 miesiecy, 0% nadplaty'
FRONTEND: Special offer cards (3 found) display with data-testid='special-offer-card-{0,1,2}'
ADMIN: Installment tab (data-testid='admin-tab-installment') accessible
ADMIN: Installment tab shows 2 logo upload fields for saunas and bathtubs
ADMIN: Special offer tab (data-testid='admin-tab-special_offer') accessible
ADMIN: Special offer tab shows editable cards with title, subtitle, value, desc, icon, image upload
critical_code_review_comments: Calculator.jsx correctly implements checkbox multi-select via inputType check (line 74-96)
Calculator.jsx calculateTotal() correctly sums base + variant + options without discount (line 111-113)
Calculator.jsx has CTA text and installment info block with proper data-testid attributes (lines 358-366)
Models.jsx correctly adds installment block to each model card (lines 298-303)
InstallmentAdmin.jsx properly handles logo upload for both saunas and bathtubs
SpecialOfferAdmin.jsx allows editing cards with photo upload capability
Backend server.py has proper Pydantic models for InstallmentSettings and SpecialOfferSettings (lines 336-343)
Backend has GET and PUT endpoints for both installment and special-offer settings
seed_data_creation: Test installment settings saved via API: sauna_logo_url='https://example.com/test-sauna-logo.png', balia_logo_url='https://example.com/test-balia-logo.png'. Default special offer cards restored after tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 13 tested 4 features: (1) Calculator checkbox multi-select - OPCJE DODATKOWE category uses inputType='checkbox' allowing multiple selections, badge shows 'X wyb.'. (2) Admin installment tab (data-testid='admin-tab-installment') has 2 logo upload fields for saunas/bathtubs. (3) Admin special offer tab (data-testid='admin-tab-special_offer') has editable cards with photo upload. (4) Calculator has no discount line, shows CTA text (data-testid='calculator-discount-cta') and installment info (data-testid='calculator-installment-info'). Model cards have installment blocks (data-testid='model-installment-{id}'). All APIs at /api/settings/installment and /api/settings/special-offer working.

calculator_checkbox_multiselect.details: OPCJE DODATKOWE section allows multiple selections, badge shows '2 wyb.' when 2 options selected

calculator_no_discount.details: Price breakdown shows only 'Cena bazowa' and 'Opcje', no 'Rabat' line

calculator_cta_text.details: Golden text 'Zbierz zamowienie teraz i zafixuj swoja indywidualna znizke!' visible below send button

calculator_installment_info.details: Installment block shows 'Raty od 500 zl/mc' with 'Od 4 do 20 miesiecy, 0% nadplaty'

model_cards_installment.details: All 13 model cards have installment blocks with 'Raty od 500 zl/mc'

admin_installment_tab.details: Tab accessible, shows 2 logo upload fields for saunas and bathtubs

admin_special_offer_tab.details: Tab accessible, shows 3 default cards with editable fields and photo upload

special_offer_cards_frontend.details: 3 special offer cards visible on /sauny with proper data-testid attributes
